hypothesis: If NN-BAX is applied to NEB calculations for LJ7 and LJ38, then the computed minimum energy paths will be as accurate as the ground-truth NEB paths (as measured by fmax and MAEi) and will require fewer expensive simulator evaluations, because the EquiformerV2 surrogate, iteratively fine-tuned on initial/final states and acquired path points, can reliably predict energies and forces along the path.
